2784.name: Stone Road
2784.description: The small road on which you are traveling crawls dangerously close to the dark forest that seeks to overtake it. Tiny animals flit about the brush and scurry past your feet in their search for food, some pausing to curiously cock their heads and peer at you, others bolting as soon as they detect your presence. What could have happened to make these animals so afraid?

2785.name: Worn Forest Path
2785.description: The forest seems especially foreboding in this area. The air is still and dead, leaves hang limp on their branches, and not a single creature can be seen scurrying about. Trudging along grimly, the weight of the forest seems to press down upon your soul and sap away your strength, robbing you of your vitality and shaking to the core your already flagging morale. You have lost 1160 experience.

npcs.name: Lorlareon the Wanderer
npcs.description: the dense forest undergrowth, leaving nary a sign of his passing.

2786.name: Worn Forest Path
2786.description: A terrible silence hangs in the air, and you get a sudden feeling that something disastrous is about to happen. Hurriedly drawing your weapon, you anxiously peer into the trees, cold beads of sweat slowly sliding down the back of your neck and clouding your eyes with their steamy moisture. Nervously mopping your brow with your sleeve, you prepare to face whatever is lurking in the trees, be it man or beast, or perhaps something far worse. . .

npcs.name: Yashinrak daemon
npcs.description: The daemon darts quickly about the brush, far quicker than your eye can follow.  Finally giving up trying to keep track of it, you stand firm as

2820.name: Stone Road
2820.description: The road branches here, winding east to connect with a small outpost set deep in the wilds. You notice that he trees seem a bit more cheerful here, and then you smile sheepishly as you reflect on the lunacy of pondering the moods of trees. Shaking your head softly to yourself and silently wondering if this place is starting to have an effect on your sanity, you hurriedly press onward.

2821.name: Shattered Outpost
2821.description: Scores of tiny graves dot the sides of the path as you proceed toward the outpost. Slowing your pace and glancing around, you notice numerous defenders hidden in the brush and perched high up in the trees. You stop suddenly, paralyzed with fear and indecision. A small man steps from behind a tree and nods curtly, and with a sudden cry they are upon you, hands blurring in the crisp forest air as well-oiled swords are smoothly slid from their scabbards and warhammers jerked from their shrouds.

npcs.name: Professional soldier
npcs.description: His beard is somewhat scraggly and his equipment has certainly seen better days, but this man is obviously not one to be trifled with; he handles his weapon confidently and moves with catlike grace.

npcs.name: Sergeant
npcs.description: none.  His eyes burn with madness after years of battling the spirits of the forest, and he eagerly turns his blade towards you. . .

2088.name: Sparse Trees
2088.description: Small trees dot the landscape here, seeking to overtake the grasses. To the east, the fields of grass maintain their hold on the terrain, while to the west the trees grow denser, gradually grouping into a large forest that stretches across the horizon.

2089.name: Grasslands
2089.description: The waving grasses flatten beneath your feet as you plod through, trying to get your bearings in this strange land. Glancing eastward, the sea of grass stretches out, broken by only a few low trees and rock formations along the horizon. To the west, a few trees begin to appear, perhaps the beginning of a forest.

npcs.name: Shade
npcs.description: The shade looks a great deal more corporeal than the other ghosts drifting about the forest, and its gnarled claws drip with the blood of

2763.name: Forest Outskirts
2763.description: Redwoods and evergreens stretch skyward around you, slowly growing more dense to the west. Their cooling shade seems an inviting offer, perhaps it would be enjoyable to enter the forest.

2091.name: Grasslands
2091.description: A bleak, cloudless sky spreads out over the landscape, covering the endless fields of grass to the east. You pause to rub your eyes, aching after hours of probing the horizon for signs of danger. Trees spread out to the west, offering welcome shelter to your weary bones. You pause to consider whether to journey into the forest or plod across the unbroken grasslands.

2764.name: Within the Forest
2764.description: You walk along a rough trail through the forest, winding past towering trees and sprawling clumps of low brush. Inhaling deeply, your nostrils fill with a loamy, sweet scent that beckons you further inward. The trail leads out of the forest to the east, and deeper within to the west.

npcs.name: Small talrynian ghost
npcs.description: The ghost before you is little more than a husk, carried about as the winds see fit.  Its body is corporeal, however; it certainly must be able to strike should it be so inclined.

2864.name: Forest Highway
2864.description: This broad thoroughfair is well maintained, and must have once served as the heart of a network of arteries connecting the far reaches of the forest to the capital city of Jular. Given the barrenness of the surrounding area and the absence of the engineers that would be needed to keep such a large road in good condition, the thought occurs to you that perhaps it is not the hand of man that preserves this land, but some other, more mystical force.

2865.name: Game Trail
2865.description: The trail winds onward through the forest, lacking any apparent direction. The forest thins to the south, where a broad road is barely visible through the dense foliage. To the north, the trail proceeds deeper within the woods, and most likely away from civilization. You have lost 680 experience.

2866.name: Game Trail
2866.description: Tall evergreens press in from all sides as you tread along the trail, wondering why the forest lacks the fauna usually found in similar areas. The only sounds that penetrate through the somber woods are the crunch of your feet upon the dried pine needles that cover the forest floor and the occasional trill of bird song, always far in the distance.

2867.name: Forest Highway
2867.description: The highway turns northward here, where it merges with Jular to form the main road of the grand city. Husks of burned trees slowly decay in the humid forest air and small shades drift about the road, wailing in despair at some incomprehensible loss.

2235.name: Sparse Trees
2235.description: The trees here are short and stunted, but offer some relief from the incredible spanse of grasses to the east. Looking westward, the forest calls to you, and you are tempted to enter the wooded realm.

2782.name: Forest Path
2782.description: The path on which you are walking was obviously created by a civilized species; it cuts a relatively straight line through the trees and tangling undergrowth. It would appear that you are near the homelands of the fabled Talrynian peoples, which must lie deeper within the forest.

npcs.name: Lorlareon the Wanderer
npcs.description: the dense forest undergrowth, leaving nary a sign of his passing.

2783.name: Stone Road
2783.description: Flattened stones have been grouped together to form a road of sorts, leading northward. A reasonably straight path has also been blazed to the east, but lacks the precise, military squareness of the road. Both appear unblocked, but thick foliage prevents travel in any other direction.
